programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Sintiéndose al borde de la muerte, Aurora revela una verdad que todos tratan de ocultar. Blanca será la principal víctima de la revelación que puede cambiarlo todo. Gustavo despide a Martín de la clínica al enterarse que es hijo de Lorenzo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo admite su miedo de enamorarse de Aurora. Ella se entera de que una falsa amiga sabe su verdad y condena la suerte que le tocó de un amor en frío. Aurora le hace una revelación a Blanca. César se abre con Natalia sobre el secuestro de Blanca.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Robert La Grange is a hard worker that is a Navy Submarine Vet. He now trucks to provide a college education for his daughter. Watch as the Chrome Shop Mafia transforms his truck to salute Submarine Vets.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Dale Hayden is a hard working truck driver that is fiercely devoted to family. He is a father to his younger sister after his mother passed away from breast cancer, and would do anything for her and her kids.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: All Eugene Jackson ever wanted was to raise a large family and own a business. After years of dedication and hard work, he's done just that -- raising four children and founding OCW Jackson's, a truck and towing company located in Little Rock, Ark.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Joe Henry is the proud owner of two poultry farms. A severe ice storm collapsed two of his poultry barns, and he lost over 500 turkeys. Now, he's working himself and his truck to the limit in order to cover his losses and provide for his family.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Joe Patty's mission is to make his local community a safe place to live. When he's not patrolling the streets as a police officer, he's seen driving his ice cream truck. Tthe Trick My Truck boys are about to repay this community man in a big way.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: "Mad" Max Gerleman made a name for himself as a renegade rescue man. Get ready as the boys take on their biggest challenge yet as they take this homemade rescue truck and morph it into a state-of-the-art vehicle that looks like it came from outer space.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Justice's 1964 Mack truck has been in his family for over 40 years, and it's still working hard. Don't miss a minute, as talents are put to the test to transform Mike's old Mack into an ode to the Justice family business.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Dustin Stout took his first ride in a truck when he was 3 years old.Recently, he bought an old International cabover engine model truck. Tthe gang pitches in to help their youngest driver yet and make his old cabover into the meanest dragster on the road.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.desc: Aired 04/27/2017. In the wake of the 9/11 attacks, songs about New York have heightened meaning, while politically-charged country music takes center stage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 4/28/2019. Kamau visits Dallas, TX - the home of the Megachurch, to find out what is creating the new face of Christianity today, in a city where church and state are far from separate.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2017. Exploring the music that kept the spirit of the civil rights movement alive following Martin Luther King Jr.’s death.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers prevent a potential home invasion when they arrest a wanted man, a passenger becomes defensive during a traffic stop, and officers help a teen recover a stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake. Officers investigate a car they spot swerving on the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de miembros de una fraternidad encuentra un lugar cubierto de gusanos, Grissom investiga la escena y cree que un estudiante está proporcionando la carne a los gusanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom es llamado por el asesinato de una joven de 17 años en el ático de un casino. Todo el equipo se ve involucrado cuando se descubre que se ha producido un secuestro junto con el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que había sido detenida por la policía aparece asesinada a tres kilómetros de la parada. No pasa mucho tiempo antes de que Robbins determine que la mujer, genéticamente hablando, no es una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se enfrenta a nuevas pruebas mientras está en el estrado de un juicio por asesinato del dueño de un restaurante.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investiga el asesinato de un hombre por alguien que aparentemente necesita una silla de ruedas. Nick investiga el asesinato de una mujer en la subcultura del narcocorrido, canciones sobre asesinatos relacionados con las drogas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick y Nick encuentran el cadáver de dos mujeres en unas obras enterradas bajo el alquitrán.El turno de swing se adentra en el mundo de las novias extranjeras por correo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofía, Sara y Greg investigan la desaparición de una mujer que volvía a casa tras una noche de fiesta con una amiga después de que su coche abandonado aparezca en el arcén de una autopista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un importante jugador de Las Vegas aparece muerto, Ecklie ordena a ambos equipos que investiguen el caso. El hombre que tenía secretos sobre todos en Las Vegas tenía uno muy grande propio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Warrick investigan un cadáver gravemente mutilado en el bosque. Grissom, Sarah y Greg intentan determinar cómo fue asesinado un hombre en una habitación de hotel. Esto les lleva a una convención de mujeres grandes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie ataca de nuevo, y el equipo de CSI prueba una nueva tecnología utilizando pruebas de un asesinato anterior.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family vacation turns deadly, the CSIs must find the killer before the survivors take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An attempt on Calleigh's life puts both her professional and personal life in jeopardy. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lifestyles of the rich and famous come under the microscope of Horatio and the CSI team when a wealthy family's nanny turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pensamientos privados
programme.desc: Cuando los bomberos encontraron a una familia entera muerta dentro de su casa, parecía un asesinato-suicidio, pero había varias pistas inconsistentes entre los escombros.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back with new twists and turns. A larger-than-life Brooklyn native breaks out some wild dance moves...hustling his way toward the $1,000,000 he hopes will fund his daughter's wedding.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona and Imogen scheme to end Marisol’s Student Council reign. The plan? Throw an unforgettable end-of-semester Degrassi holiday carnival. But with a huge family crisis looming, Fiona worries she may have over-promised.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Degrassi students head back to class, Drew decides the time is right to break up with Katie. Clare returns from the break excited to reconnect with Eli, but does he feel the same way?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After blacking out, Drew tries to piece together what happened at the party. Clare's new internship means she has less time for Eli, but they can still make it work… right? Maya embarrasses herself at a band audition.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Katie's anger at Drew boils over, she searches for a way to make him suffer. Eli clashes with Becky while planning Degrassi's next play. Meanwhile, a new guy catches Tristan's eye.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew feels like his life is falling apart. Is he upset about losing Bianca, or is something bigger going on? While casting the play, Eli and Becky work to resolve their creative differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig tries to hide the fact that he's poor from Tori. When Eli shares his vision for the musical, Dave isn’t sure he has what it takes to play Romeo. Fiona returns to Degrassi, thrilled to see her girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig will do anything to impress Tori… even steal. Fiona wants Imogen to define their relationship: Are they a couple or not? The hockey team teases Dave about his role in the play.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Alli is offered a scholarship to MIT, her parents are bursting with pride -- but is it the right choice? Meanwhile, Jake decides college isn't for him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli makes a difficult choice about her future. With a little help from Katie, Jake tries to prove himself to his father. Cam snaps at Maya before a big game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna bonds with Becky -- and Becky's hot brother, Luke -- but will religious differences come between them? Clare obsesses over her journalism mentor, Asher. Drew is offered a job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna gets baptized, but did she do it for the wrong reasons? Drew is failing his classes, and considers dropping out of Degrassi. Connor's tweets embarrass Clare in front of Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare writes an article that stirs up trouble at school and makes her a new enemy -- Mike Dallas. Tori, Tristan, and Dave compete in a talent contest. Drew feels distant from Bianca, so he goes on a spending spree.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is not feeling very good about herself, so she lets Tori give her a pageant-style makeover.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya's friendship with Tori is tested when both girls compete in the Miss Millennial pageant.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated with her heavy workload, Alli decides to have a little fun -- with or without Dave.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After several days without sleep, Alli crashes at the worst possible time.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The King's Demons
programme.desc: The Master and the Doctor fight for control over Kamelion’s mind while Turlough and Tegan make new allies in the castle in an attempt to avoid the iron maiden.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors
programme.desc: Someone is stealing the Doctor's past incarnations from the timestream. The present Doctor must act fast to survive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors face the dangers of the Death Zone. The High Council of Time Lords recruits an unlikely ally to rescue them.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors
programme.desc: Is there a traitor amongst the High Council - and what is the secret of Rassilon?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Five Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors confront the traitor in Rassilon's Tomb, but even victory will have consequences for the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Resurrection Of The Daleks
programme.desc: Davros has been kept in suspended animation aboard a prison spacestation but now the Daleks have come to collect him, aided by Commander Lytton and his ‘policemen’.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Resurrection Of The Daleks
programme.desc: Davros has been kept in suspended animation aboard a prison space station but now the Daleks have come to collect him, aided by Commander Lytton and his ‘policemen’.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Resurrection Of The Daleks
programme.desc: As the prison station survivors fight the invaders, the Dalek agents on Earth take extreme measures to protect the time corridor from being used by the Doctor’s friends.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Resurrection Of The Daleks
programme.desc: As the prison station survivors fight the invaders, the Dalek agents on Earth take extreme measures to protect the time corridor from being used by the Doctor’s friends.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Caves of Androzani
programme.desc: Gun-runners are on Androzani Minor, supplying the rebellious android-builder Sharez Jek.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Caves of Androzani
programme.desc: Salateen tells Peri and the Doctor they are dying from spectrox tomaemia.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Caves of Androzani
programme.desc: Jek believes Peri will fall in love with him and the Doctor is caught by the gunrunners.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Caves of Androzani
programme.desc: Morgus is ruined, and Jek goes on a murderous rampage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Twin Dilemma
programme.desc: The mysterious Professor Edgeworth has kidnapped twin human child genii, Romulus and Remus, and Hugo Lang holds the new Doctor responsible for the destruction of his spaceship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Twin Dilemma
programme.desc: On Jaconda, Mestor’s cruel domination over the planet's population continues while on Titan Three, the Doctor seems to have been blown up in a booby-trapped building.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Twin Dilemma
programme.desc: Mestor claims that all he wants is for the Sylvest twins to help him repopulate his home planet but the Doctor knows there’s more to this than meets the eye...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Twin Dilemma
programme.desc: Mestor’s true plan is revealed and the Doctor's old Gallifreyan friend Azmael comes to the realisation that he has been corrupted long enough by the Gastropod leader...

programme.title: Doctor Who: Attack of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Cybermen are hiding in the London sewers and turning humans into semi-cybernetic slaves. On Telos, two slaves make a bid for freedom and find a way to escape the planet for good.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Attack of the Cybermen
programme.desc: On Telos, the Doctor is reintroduced to the Cyber Leader and meets the Cryons, the planet’s original inhabitants who want their planet back and will go to any lengths to do so…

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: When the Tardis runs low on Zeiton-7 the Doctor must visit the planet Varos, a mining colony ruled by a brutal regime that encourages public torture and executions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri must escape the Punishment Dome, a sadistic system of entertainment and political control on Varos.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor of Varos begins to suspect someone is working against him. The alien Sil puts his plans into motion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor faces the punishment dome alongside Peri whilst the Doctor fights to stop the evil alien Sil.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors
programme.desc: The Second Doctor and Jamie visit space station Camera to speak to the scientist Dastari.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter in

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A farmer fears his sheep has been shot. But has it suffered an attack by a dog or a fox? Peter's worried about a tawny owl whose eye he removed 18 months ago. Flynn now has a serious problem with his remaining eye, which means his life is in danger.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is scheduled to play the drums in his first music school recital. Although his parents and the Mertzes are overcome with nervousness, Little Ricky seems calm until his big moment arrives, then goes to pieces.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mario, the Ricardos' and Mertzes' gondolier in Venice, comes to New York to surprise his brother, but turns up at the Ricardos' apartment when he can't find him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: While on vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go on a shopping spree and spend a whopping $140! To make sure that their wives don't repeat their spree Ricky and Fred take the ladies on their next fishing trip.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are cast in Little Ricky's school play when it runs short of cast members. Ricky plays a hollow tree, Lucy is the wicked witch, Fred plays the friendly frog, and Ethel is transformed in to the fairy princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is turning 5 years old and Lucy had a party planned for Saturday, but Caroline Appleby is throwing a birthday party for her son Stevie on the same day. Neither mother is willing to change the date of their party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are determined to get rid of the puppy their son has brought home. They have a hard time overcoming Little Ricky’s arguments that it’s a welcome addition to a home that already boasts a parakeet, a frog, a lizard, a turtle and a goldfish.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has become tired of living in the city and drops some none-too-subtle hints to Ricky that it would be nice to move to the country. Unbeknownst to her Ricky has already placed a comfortable deposit on a house in Westport, Connecticutt.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are anxious about their move to the country. Reality really sets in when Fred shows their apartment to a young couple. The Taylors will take the apartment but need to move in immediately.
