programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: As three of Cobra's relay cubes are activated, Cobra commander moves forward with his plans to activate the fourth and final cube in the sea of lost souls. Meanwhile, Shipwreck and Snake Eyes escape Cobra's troopers in Enterprise City.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.desc: Observe the risky, clever methods that marine families use to create new life.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/2/13: Desmond Jennings drove in two runs and Alex Cobb struck out five batters over 6 2/3 innings to help lead the Rays to a 4-0 Wild Card shutout win over the Indians.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1980 MLB All-Star Game where the game started in a pitching duel until the AL scored two runs in the 5th inning. The NL took the lead in the 6th with a hit from George Hendrick.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1981 MLB All-Star Game. Played in front of the largest crowd in All-Star Game history, this tight-knit contest saw Mike Schmidt, Dave Parker, and Gary Carter go deep.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: In 1979, Willie Stargell leads the Pittsburgh Pirates, spurned on by the motto "We Are Family". The Pirates meet the Orioles in the World Series.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: In 1980, the AL East saw the Yankees and Orioles win 100 games. Neither team would reach the World Series, as George Brett and the Royals would capture their first pennant. Kansas City would take on the Phillies in an exciting six-game World Series.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Take an exclusive tour of Rogers Centre in Downtown Toronto, Canada. The stadium opened in 1989 and was the first sports venue with a fully retractable roof.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Clayton Kershaw makes history in Los Angeles with a near-perfect outing against the Rockies, as the Dodgers lefty strikes out 15 in a dominant no-hitter.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/25/14: All eyes are on Derek Jeter as he plays in his final home game of his 20-year career. Yankee Stadium erupts when "The Captain" knocks a walk-off RBI single against the O's in an emotional win for the Yankees.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/30/14: The Royals rallied back three different times, and Salvador Pérez laced a clutch walk-off RBI single to defeat the Athletics in the 2014 A.L. Wild Card Game, 9-8.

programme.title: MST3K: Santo In The Treasure Of Dracula
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch SANTO IN THE TREASURE OF DRACULA (1969). The Mads introduce the Gizmoplex.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch ROBOT WARS (1993). A new SOL is introduced and a new Gizmonic tech arrives.

programme.title: MST3K: Beyond Atlantis
programme.desc: A new test subject arrives on the Simulator of Love, and her crew watches BEYOND ATLANTIS (1973).

programme.title: MST3K: Munchie
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch as a child befriends MUNCHIE (1992). Jonah refuses to go back into the theater and suffers the consequences.

programme.title: MST3K: Doctor Mordrid
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch as the magical DOCTOR MORDRID (1992) defends Earth from the forces of evil, and Dr. Kabahl schemes to increase viewership.

programme.title: MST3K: Demon Squad
programme.desc: Joel's crew watch as a paranormal investigator tries to save the world in DEMON SQUAD (2019), and the original test subject returns.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera vs. Jiger
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch Gamera save the day at Osaka's Expo '70, in GAMERA VS JIGER (1970). Pearl tries to convince Kinga to take a break.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna defends her new boyfriend to her sister, Bar makes peace with Ashley's family, Kayla and Stephan come together for Izaiah's medical treatment, and Sean bails on Jade.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Lexi and Kyler go on spring break, Brianna asks Robert to move to Oregon, Ashley gets into a brawl with Bar's mom, and Kayla tries to fix Stephan's relationship with her mom.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley gets back on track with school. Kayla realizes she may have to drop out of school to take care of Izaiah. Brianna struggles to balance multiple jobs and childcare. Kiaya is under pressure to make peace with her baby's father.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna reaches out to her ex. Kayla's new boyfriend plans to move out of state. Rachel decides she doesn't want a paternity test. Kiaya worries her girlfriend isn't taking parenthood seriously. Ashley prepares for her family and Bar to meet.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla starts to deal with her second pregnancy. Rachel is due any day but her family is forced to worry about her sister instead. Kiaya questions Teazha's commitment to their relationship. Brianna gets shocking news from an old high school friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna gets a paternity test for Braeson. Kayla finally tells her mom the news about her pregnancy. Rachel gives birth and makes a decision about the birth certificate. Ashley and Bar try to revive their relationship with a trip to LA.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Let, Haexa y Vaski reciben a Apolo, el ex de Leticia. Vaski es quien toma el pelo a la novata. Ortega se debate entre Camila y Mariana y JV no puede decidirse entre Mari A y Leticia, lo que culmina en una gran bronca tras la Pool Party.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Abelha y Julio tienen una cita, Hadad es eliminado. Una pelea entre Ortega y Julienne sacude la casa. Ortega, Haeixa, Gab y Angietta se besan mucho en una aventura que acaba en desnudez. La tableta de regalos Deja la suite principal, ella elige a Julio.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Bruno, el ex de Vaski, llega y tiene una cita con Apolo. Julienne se pelea con Mari F por Ortega. Muchos besos en la fiesta fetichista y a Gab le regalan la primera suite triple master, con Lua y Leticia, la noche está llena de sexo, confusión y llanto.

programme.desc: A time capsule rolls into the shop in the form of a 1983 Silverado with exactly 69.2 miles on it; the owner recently passed away, and his daughter wants to finish turning his truck into a modern muscle car under the hood.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't stand the constant meddling by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah. Next Deborah suspects that her long-time girlfriend has been cheating on her. Later, Angelina was pregnant when her husband had an affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dan is here today to beg Heather to give him another chance. Next Ginny wants Tim back and says that he still calls her. Later Shenidia is furious that another women is trying to steal her boyfriend of 4 years, Gary.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats wage a death-defying battle with a group of flying fish, and Luffy is shocked by the familiar face of their latest enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji squares off against his lookalike, Camie shows off just how fast a mermaid can swim, and Luffy defeats a giant bull without even landing a blow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their showdown with Duval, Luffy and the Straw Hats enjoy a hearty meal before proceeding to the site of their next adventure – an island bursting with bubbles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stop at an island overflowing with bubbles to get their ship modified for underwater travel, but it's not long before they stumble upon an outrageous explosion and attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their fishy mates, the Straw Hats make it to the auction house in time to save Camie, but explosive elements prevent them from taking her back by force. Luckily, Nami's concocted a very generous plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's plan to save Camie goes belly up when a snot-nosed Celestial Dragon outbids the Straw Hats. Luffy and Zoro make an explosive arrival at the auction house and promptly open up a deadly can of worms.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turns a mermaid auction into a pirate-style brawl when he knocks the snot out of a Celestial Dragon. With a fleet of marines out to get them, the Straw Hats will have to fight their way off the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: They saved Camie from the auction block, but now the Straw Hats are surrounded by a fleet of marines. Lucky for Luffy, Eustass "Captain" Kidd and Trafalgar Law are ready to join the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats join forces with Kidd's crew and Trafalgar's mates to make short work of the marines, but they're in for a surprise when they encounter a Warlord of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew duck the marines by hiding out at Rayleigh's house. While Chopper tends to Hachi, Rayleigh entertains the Straw Hats with tales of his days as first mate on Gold Roger's ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Kizaru has arrived to lead the marines on a mission to wipe out all pirates. Meanwhile, Luffy and his crew prepare for a deadly battle with one of the Warlords of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A groovy pirate belts out a tune that leaves Kizaru in pieces, but the admiral pulls himself together in time for a crushing Light Speed Kick. Luffy and Sanji try to protect the injured Zoro from a Warlord lookalike.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats narrowly defeat a robot that resembles one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea. But before the dust settles on the field of battle, a far deadlier foe comes looking for a fight.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An army of scantily-clad women warriors want to investigate Luffy's family jewels, but the captain of the Straw Hats is more interested in reuniting with his lost mates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The women chasing Luffy are loyal subjects of Boa Hancock, the curvaceous Warlord of the Sea. This stone-cold beauty is deadly, and she's about to pick a fight with an entire fleet of marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's search for a seaworthy vessel leads to a "drop-in" on the Snake Princess during the royal bathing hour. The view is world-class, but it might turn the rubber-man to stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.desc: Andromeda is tasked with escorting medical ships safely through Drago-Kazov space.

programme.desc: An agent of the Abyss tries to lure Harper into joining the Magog.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A beloved member of the local community is brutally murdered with part of his body apparently taken as a souvenir by the killer; detectives try to make sense of this horrifying crime despite conflicting stories and a possible false confession.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, police discover she had an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After an elderly woman comes into a large sum of money, she is attacked; investigators uncover a twisted tale of of addiction, brutality and betrayal.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A U.S. Navy veteran is brutally beaten to death during a home robbery; to find the killer, police must sift through various lies as several suspects desperately attempt to cover their tracks.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime; however, after investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect; risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother of two disappears after a night out at a local bar in New Mexico; investigators race the clock in the hopes of finding her alive, and are eventually stunned by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A shooting in broad daylight in the city of Waterloo, Iowa leaves two dead; investigators Camarata and Moller follow a trail of bloody footprints to a list of suspects and an unexpected lead from a knowledgeable confidential informant.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring how ancient Egyptian engineers built the monumental Great Pyramid at Giza.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Chaos

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We get a Pacific Rim rush when we visit energetic, ever-changing Hong Kong. On a famous Star Ferry, Rudy savors one of the most majestic skylines on earth.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta desesperadamente de obtener la cooperación de un hombre desnudo. Después de una persecución, la policía descubre que el conductor es un niño. La policía tiene que lidiar con un problema de drogas y mentiras.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía toma medidas desesperadas contra un sospechoso agresivo. Agentes detienen a un hombre con drogas. La policía sospecha que un conductor nervioso que se rehúsa a ser revisado tiene marihuana en su auto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se convierte en una carrera todo terreno por un barrio. La policía encuentra un sospechoso fugitivo escondido en el clóset de su pariente. Una pelea domestica estalla por papas fritas y salsa.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: En el Control Fronterizo de Santa Rosa, un ciudadano Peruano es descubierto con cincuenta mil dólares sin declarar. En el Complejo Fronterizo de Colchane los agentes descubren a una mujer golpeada y van e busca de su agresor.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: En Colombia un grupo de jóvenes mochileros descubren un cadáver. Miembros las fuerzas de seguridad peruanas patrullan rutas clandestinas de contrabandistas. Una familia estaba cruzando el Puente Internacional de Rumichaca y son detenidos.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: Tras una persecución, la policía captura a un asaltante armado, y un conductor ebrio es golpeado por los daños que causó en un choque.

programme.title: Mo'Nique: One Night Stand
programme.desc: Known for her sassy attitude and outrageous humor, Oscar winner Mo'Nique takes her side-splitting act to the stage in this hilarious stand-up comedy special.

programme.title: Lil Rel: Undisputed Comedy
programme.desc: This Comedic young gun, hailing from Chicago, takes the stage by storm with hilarious tales about ghetto dates, hood rats, and four-eyed thugs.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Paul Mooney: Analyzing White America
programme.desc: Paul Mooney is angry, fearless and very funny. Here he takes direct aim at racism and White America and hits his targets with dead-on accuracy and humor.

programme.title: Roy Wood Jr.: Father Figure

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 responds to a cry for help from a doomed civilization, which promises to give Earthlings access to advanced technology in exchange for supplies that would help them defeat their enemies. But they soon discover that SG-1 may not be helping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After relocating an endangered civilization to a safe new planet, the team realizes that another race of aliens is planning to incinerate the planet's surface to make it inhabitable. Will SG-1 be able to reason with the marauding aliens?

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Vestida de luto Soledad llega a casarse con Alcides. Hugo está muy débil, pero hace lo posible para llegar a la iglesia e impedirlo. Beatriz escapa para ir a la boda y revelar quién la violó.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides toca la puerta de Soledad, pero se encuentra con una Eloísa muy coqueta, ella le dice dónde está su esposa. Hugo piensa refugiarse en la cabaña, no imagina lo que está por suceder.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo cubre su rostro para secuestrar el carruaje en el que se traslada Soledad, ella puede descubrirlo. Rebeca y Hércules, su amante, buscan pistas del tesoro escondido por su difunto esposo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad persigue al supuesto ladrón y entra a una mina, seguirla es para Hugo como regresar al ataúd, por la condición de su enfermedad. Todo puede pasar cuando Beatriz y Alcides se encuentran.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia interroga al pequeño David para saber quién es su padre. Además, quiere investigar si el Tigre ha estado robando oro de su mina. Fernando tiene una horrible pesadilla en la que ve a su madre, la Patrona, asesinando a su padre, Marcos Beltrán.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene y Alejandro hacen el amor, mientras que Gabriela sueña que disfruta de una noche de pasión con su patrón. Ante las acusaciones de Antonia, la minera defiende con entereza a su padre. Fernando sigue atormentado y busca el consuelo de su madre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los hermanos Beltrán se mueren por estar cerca de Gabriela. Alejandro la invita a cenar. Al regresar a casa, no aguanta las ganas y la besa. Fernando no soporta verlos juntos, habla con su madre y le confiesa que él fue quien violó a Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El beso de Alejandro despierta los traumas de Gabriela. Antonia se da cuenta de que David podría ser su nieto. Alejandro sorprende a Gabriela pidiéndole matrimonio. El Tigre rechaza el soborno de Antonia. Confirman que hay oro en el Chamuco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena le cuenta a Norma sus sospechas sobre las intenciones de Óscar y Juan, luego que los escucha hablar de la fortuna Elizondo y encuentra fotos de Libia, se aterran al recordar quién era.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cree que Juan y Óscar quieren envenenarla a ella y a su hermana, tras golpear a su esposo, Norma la rescata en la calle. Franco es traicionado por Rosario y Eduvina intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: La traición

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they head into The Wilds of Ohio to visit a 10,000-acre conservation center that's home to over 25 species. They take a closer look at some very unique animals like Szechwan takins, Bactrian camels, rhinos, and even a cheetah!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he visits one of his favorite African destinations while enjoying beautiful unspoiled vistas, meeting amazing Masai people, and getting up close and personal with the animal population, including lions, elephants, hyenas, ostriches, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of Africa's best national parks, like the world-famous Serengeti, Botswana's Chobe National Park, and Lope National Park in Gabon. Forest elephants, Leopards, Hippos, Crocs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack and Suzi are stunned to see the Great Migration in action as animals cross the Mara River into Tanzania's Serengeti National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: In the wild, animals use their noses to find food, water and even mates! Today, Jungle Jack counts down the animal kingdom’s superior sniffers - from grizzly bears and sharks, to dogs and rhinos – find out which notable nose is the most powerful!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Born in the U.S.A
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with homegrown adventures, from right here in the ole U. S. of A! Moose, cougars, gators and even an underwater adventure from America’s 50th state!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Just Beachy
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s countdown love the beach just as much as Jungle Jack! Come along for a coastal adventure with African penguins, sea lions, marine iguanas, elephant seals and sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they head to South Africa's Western Cape to discover the Sanbona Wildlife Reserve!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree Huggers
programme.desc: Today’s creatures seem to defy gravity with their ease in the trees! Orangutans, gibbons, bats, sloths, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.

programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.

programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A bevy of beauties, including a stunning new cruise director, board the Pacific Princess for an all-woman voyage to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Mystery abounds when a woman becomes friendly with a man she knew in a past life but he doesn't remember her. At the same time, Captain Stubing pursues a beautiful passenger who seems intent on avoiding him.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a 100-year-old wooden beam with a new steel one. The tank gets removed by a specialist. The old concrete from the foundation gets transported to a recycling center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new concrete foundation is poured. Finding mature specimen trees for the yard. A precast concrete bulkhead is installed. The old rubble foundation gets waterproofed with synthetic rubber spray.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Steel beam fabrication and erection on the house. HVAC plans for the second floor. Front porch demoed with heavy machinery and new footings for a new porch. Working on the firebox and chimney.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Starting a new chimney. A 100-year-old brick factory. Designing the kitchen of the homeowner’s dreams. Tommy changes the pitch of the two back dormers to match the pitch of the new gable.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom range hood. The original chimney is demoed and Mark McCullough builds a new one. Family room, tile, and wood paneling design choices. A new slab floor is coated with a speckled epoxy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A hidden doorway is revealed. The new master bath presents a classic plumbing problem. Creating elaborate cuts with computerized machines. Scott Caron installs a ceiling fan. Arts and Crafts windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy builds the new Arts and Crafts front porch. Richard travels to the world’s largest underground quarry. Design and color selection. Mark McCullough shows Kevin the lost art of stucco.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An outdoor yoga shed. Installing a standing-seam copper roof. Trim a window using a PVC product. Richard installs a state-of-the-art boiler. Richard shows advanced, eco-friendly building techniques.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Removing a service pole at the front of the property. Building flared porch columns. A new brick patio. Kitchen cabinets are delivered and installed. Flashing decorative pieces on front gables.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingling the house. Figuring out window treatments. Radiant floor tubing is installed. Mark repairs the grand living-room fireplace. Tommy and Norm frame up the back deck coming out the side door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy assembles the roof. Kevin tries Lazure painting technique. Installing wood paneling in a corner of the living room and refinishing oak veneer. Roger plants screening trees that Emily selected.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Installing Shiplap. Laying the second set of steps for a walkway. Mauro Henrique reviews paneling. Marble slab is cut for the kitchen island. A cast stone mantel surrounds the new fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Final marble kitchen island installation. Laying giant stones for a fieldstone wall. How radiant floor heating and state of the art air conditioning works. Tommy and Kevin install a dog door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Arts and Crafts house in Arlington is near completion and the guys come to take a last look and celebrate with the homeowners. Roger Cook presents the homeowners with a special gift.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin introduces Detroit and describes some of its history. Kevin meets Frank and Tamiko Polk, the homeowners, and assess some of the repairs needed. Frank and Kevin start demo on the roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets Detroit’s Mayor about revitalizing neighborhoods. Rehabbed & Ready fixes homes in Grandmont Rosedale for families. Installing an alarm system. Blowing in new insulation from the roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard checks the plumbing stack at the Russell Woods project and Tommy investigates a leaky parapet. Kevin tours an automaker’s Dearborn estate while a tree threatens the Grandmont Rosedale project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy helps the family remove peeling paint. Work begins to restore the original leaded stained-glass windows in the living room. Richard learns all about Motown, a major Detroit institution.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Tommy Morrison vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1993 Tommy Morrison battled George Foreman for the WBO world heavyweight title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas with Foreman getting a point deducted in round ten the bout resulted in a victory for Morrison.

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On February 15th, 1978 Leon Spinks fought Muhammad Ali for WBA & WBC World Heavyweight titles although Spinks defeated Ali he was stripped of the WBC title as he chose to fight The Greatest, Muhammad Ali instead of the #1 contender Ken Norton.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Bert Cooper
programme.desc: On August 5th, 1990 Ray Mercer faced Bert Cooper for Heavyweight titles at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City with the bout ending by unanimous decision in favor of Mercer.

programme.title: Paulie Ayala vs Johnny Tapia 1
programme.desc: On June 26th, 1999, Paulie Ayala fought Johnny Tapia for the WBA Bantamweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In what was the 1999 Ring Magazine Fight of the Year, the two men put on a show that ended with an Ayala unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Orlando Romero
programme.desc: On September 15th, 1983 Ray Mancini fought Orlando Romero for the WBA World Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with the bout ending in the ninth round by knockout earning Mancini the win.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.desc: While the cadets work on their snowboarding badge, a falling tree knocks a gondola loose; the Cadets help Davey Hasselhawg give the little Turkskis a swim lesson, and then have to rescue Davey from a whirlpool.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Crusher steals all of Gabby's tools, and Blaze must help her retrieve them so she can repair the Monster Machines.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets try to give Bea a day off, but when Swift's jet goes haywire, they need Bea to race to the rescue; Brody tries to land his amazing turbo-surfing move on land, as the Cadets compete in the Big Swirl Games.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Chomps and Rocco challenge Brody and Penny to a whitewater trick competition; when Shirley's city cousins visit Big Swirl, things don't exactly go as planned on their exciting island tour.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Baddy teams up with Betty, Chomps and Rocco to hijack the HQ Command Flyer so he can take over Big Swirl; Davey Hasselhawg has to get Cheep, Chirp and friends ready for an awesome wakeboard show when Brody is called to a rescue.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod and Brody try to earn a Jungle Exploring badge, but get lost and must work together to help Swift find them; when some lucky students get to be cadets for a day, Top Wing and their junior cadets end up having to rescue their teacher.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod is excited to sing at Rhonda's until Chomps and Rocco take the piano; Margo the Monkey and the Banana Bandits break into Headquarters and try to take off with the HQ Command Flyer.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Rod proves that he is a rooster, and not a chicken as he finds a little bear cub lost in the Haunted Cave; a jet-flying bat roars into Danger Canyon to show off his prowess.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Beavers fix up Ker-Splash Canyon, an amazing water park; when rushing water endangers a group of reclusive Dodos and threatens to destroy the canyon, the Cadets race underground to rescue the Dodos and save the canyon.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand new monster machine named Watts - a super fast truck with electric tires; but when one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a mysterious bandit makes off with Blaze's metallic trophy, he must track down the culprit.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
